summary: Iteration 67 - Service Partner Capabilities Admin UI testing complete. All CRUD operations, filtering, and routing/best endpoint working correctly. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All form fields present, create/edit/delete working, filters functional, preferred routing checkbox works.

tests: Page loads with form and table
Sorts by preferred_routing, priority_rank, quality_score, current_active_queue, success_rate
Returns null when no matching capabilities
Setting preferred_routing=true clears other preferred for same service/country
routing/best prefers partner with preferred_routing=true over better stats
New mapping appears in Existing Mappings list
Edit button loads mapping into form
Service name, country code, status displayed
Preferred Routing tag visible when true

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution. Existing mapping: PrintMax Tanzania (printing_branding, TZ)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Partner Capabilities Admin UI fully functional at /admin/service-partner-capabilities. All CRUD operations work. Filters by service_key and country_code work. routing/best endpoint returns best partner based on preferred_routing > priority_rank > quality_score > current_active_queue > success_rate. Added data-testid attributes to form and table components. Added missing Turnaround tag to table display. Collection name is partner_service_capabilities.
improvements_made: Added data-testid attributes to ServicePartnerCapabilityForm.jsx for better testability
Added data-testid attributes to ServicePartnerCapabilityTable.jsx for better testability
Added missing Turnaround tag display in table (was in form but not shown in table)
